title: pteris aquilina var. esculenta
intro: Pteris aquilina var. esculenta, also known as the Chinese Brake Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Pteris. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pteris aquilina var. esculenta include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried and consumed as a powder or capsule.
